maintainer_only_defaults.rationale: Scripts remain SO-local unless projected by cos_init.py or listed as profile-driver scripts above.

default.description: Lean default consumer-project profile generated by cos_init.py.

full.description: Full consumer-project profile generated by cos_init.py for maximum primitive availability.

default.description: Projected by default profile for implemented harnesses.

full.description: Projected only by full profile for implemented harnesses.

maintainer-only.description: SO maintainer surface; do not count as consumer-project available unless an explicit projection contract is added.

profile-driver.description: SO-local installer/profile/settings/doctor script whose consumer proof is successful profile projection, not copying the script into the consumer project.

shared.description: Projected in at least one implemented harness/profile and safe to count as consumer-project available.

projection_profiles.purpose: Machine-readable projection profile contract for ACC. Profiles describe which consumer-project primitive surfaces are proven by cos_init.py and which SO-local scripts are profile/install drivers rather than files copied into consumer projects.
